violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Particle board cabinets at FOH service counter have areas of water swelling/damage.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. FOH service counter cabinets need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under equipment in FOH and BOH areas have a buildup of debris and need cleaning.
